task_objective: Replace hardcoded 1M limit with user-controllable flags
design_decisions: Added 'correlations' and 'monotonicity' boolean flags to profile() and ProfileReport().
Maintained 1M row threshold as a default safety measure, but allow manual override if the user explicitly passes True.

Determined that the 20M x 20col OOM was primarily driven by Spearman ranking (O(N log N) memory/compute) and Monotonicity window functions (full table scan with lag), combined with the O(C^2) correlation matrix size.
results: Users now have full control over expensive computations while retaining sensible defaults for massive datasets.
